body:
Rewrote the roguelike mode to fully delegate game logic to the backend state machine. Key changes:

- useRogueLikeLogic — extends useGameLogic directly; all game logic handled by backend socket, frontend only renders
- RogueGamePage — mirrors GamePage architecture with boss video animations, boss death animation now gates enhancement modal via onBossDefeatedAnimationEnd
- routes/rogue.js — REST persistence using existing SavePoint model and lib/boss.ts / lib/savepoint.ts modules
- pveHandlers.ts — added advanceLayer (buffs applied to player.buffs) and restoreFromCheckpoint socket events
- skills.ts / actions.ts / state.ts — fixed shield permanent cooldown bug; added cooldownRounds field and tickShieldCooldown so shield recovers after 2 full rounds
- useGameLogic — fixed evaluateHand to use same formula as backend HAND_SCORES
title: feat: rogue full backend integration, boss death animation
